acceptance: When compute_phase_ratios is called with a phase artifact summary, it returns 'aligned' on stdout (exit 0) when no ratio exceeds 1.5x its declared bound.

When any of the three ratios (modified-files-over-declared, LOC-over-estimate, AC-coverage-over-expected) exceeds 1.5x, compute_phase_ratios prints 'flagged' followed by the failing ratio names, one per line.
Where task.where.modify is empty in the upstream task, modified-files-over-declared shall be computed against task.where.create alone.
When tests/test_deviation_heuristic.sh runs, all four cases in tests/fixtures/deviation_heuristic/cases.json pass.
